name: Skillet Okra
recipeIngredient: 16 oz (1 cup) whole tomatoes, undrained, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large skillet.
2. Stir well and cover.
3. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Note: This recipe yields 8 servings with each serving amounting to approximately 1/2 cup exchanges. The dish contains 0 cholesterol, 43 calories, 10 grams of carbohydrates, 1 gram of protein, and no trans fats or saturated fat. It also provides 208 milligrams of sodium.
